chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In this video we will learn about best worst and average case analysis of algorithm.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for example I will be taking two algorithms that is linear search and binary search tree.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I will take two examples linear search and binary search tree.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So first commonly we use examples on linear search. This is common thing.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I will take binary search tree also and I will show you the time case analysis on binary search tree also.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So we will learn about best case and worst case time, worst case and worst case time

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: and minimum time in worst case, maximum time in worst case and average case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So you will come to know all these things. So in this video you are going to learn these things.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: The first one is linear search.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If a set of element, list of elements are given then when we are searching for any element in that list

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: then we have different search methods available like linear search and binary search.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Let us see how linear search works.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Here I have a list of 10 elements and in this I want to search for some key element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Let us say I want to search for key element 7.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: What is the method for searching for a key element?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: For looking for a key element the linear search will start scanning the list from left hand side

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: by checking each element at a time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So it will start checking whether this is 7, no.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Go to the next element, is it 7, no.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Is it 7, is it 7.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So it will go on checking all the elements until either it finds an element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes, the element is found.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So here is an element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So total in how many comparisons we will get an element?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: That is in 6 comparisons we get an element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Suppose I am searching for a key element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then let us start linear search.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 20 it will check for the first element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: No, it is not present.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: The next one, next one, next one, next one.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: It will check all the elements and it finds that 20 is not present in the list.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So when we search in a list the search may be either successful or it may be unsuccessful.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for 7 it was successful and we found it at index 5 and 20 is not found when we have checked the entire list.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is how linear search works.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now let us understand what is best case and what is best case time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: What is worst case, what is worst case time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: We will find out in this linear search algorithm.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: First, let us see what is best case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In case if you are searching for a key element which is present at first index.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then it is best case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In case, you may be searching for any element from the list.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: But if you are searching for a key element which is present at first index, the very beginning index.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then that is best case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Searching key element present at first index.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This is best case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then what the time it will take if I am searching for the first key element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Here in my example 8 is the first key element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If I am searching for 8 then it will take constant time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Best case time is constant.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I can write it as order of 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Best case time for n elements is order of 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Here I write B of n is order of 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now Omega, what is that we will see afterwards.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: First I have written that function.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now worst case of an algorithm, linear search algorithm.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: What is the worst case?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: When the algorithm will take maximum time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If I am searching for the key which is at the last index.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Searching a key at last index.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In my example 18 is the key which is present at last index.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So that is the worst case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: What is the time taken for searching that key element?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So I have to check for all n elements then I can reach there.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now what is the time taken in this worst case?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Worst case time is n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So worst case for n elements is n and that is order of n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So here I write worst case for n elements is order of n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So now I have best case as well as worst case times given for linear search.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now average case time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Average case is defined by all possible case time divided by number of cases.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for average case you have to find out all possible cases and the time taken in each possible case and then divided by number of cases.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this type of analysis is very difficult.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: It may not be possible on every algorithm.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So rarely we do it and mostly for average case the time that we get will be similar to worst case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So that's why we prefer finding worst case time for algorithms.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Average case analysis may not be possible always.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Let us check for linear search what are the cases.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So let me tell you just in case if you are searching for a key present on first index.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In case if you are searching for a key present at second index or in case third index, in case fourth index, in case nth index.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So these are all the cases.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So in case if you are searching for a key present at first index then average time for this one it is 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If I am searching for a key present at second index it will take two comparisons and third index three comparisons then so on.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Last index n comparison.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Total how many cases are there?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: n cases are there.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So what is this equal to?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This is n into n plus 1 by 2 and divided by n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This is cancelled and this is n plus 1 by 2.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So average case time for n elements is n plus 1 by 2.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: All these cases and the time complexities we are finding based on number of comparisons.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: How many comparisons are required for finding an element?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So now you have best case and its time and the worst case and its time and the average case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So in average case I consider all possible cases n elements are there n possible cases.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: You may be searching for first element or second element or third element any element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for each I have taken the time and the number of cases by n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is n plus 1 by 2.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now let us apply asymptotic notations on this one.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: See I have told you in some video in one video in asymptotic notation that cases are no way related to notations.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Notations are for the functions.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Cases are just a type of analysis done on algorithm.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Let us see how we can apply notations.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: See I have best case time as 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Can I write this as best case is big O of n, sorry big O of 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I can write big O of 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Can I write it as omega of 1?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Can I write it as theta of 1?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: See how what is the function?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Function is one constant.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So when you have a function constant this belongs to constant class.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So when it directly belongs to constant class I can use theta of 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: And even I can use upper bound and lower bound also.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This we have already studied asymptotic notation.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So any function greater than equal to comes as upper bound.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Less than equal to comes as lower bound.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: And exactly same function that is theta.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is theta.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now worst case the time is n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This belongs to class that is linear.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Function is linear.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Can I write this as worst case time is big O of n?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Worst case of n is omega of n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes I can write.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Worst case of n is theta of n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I can use any of these notations.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: There is no fixed notation to show that this is best case, this is worst case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Best case can be written using any notation and the worst case can also be written using any notation.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Don't take it wrong big O is for worst case or omega is for best case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: No it's wrong.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: You can use theta also for best case or worst case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: You can use big O for any cases.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: And even for average case I have a function n plus 1 by 2.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This belongs to which class?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: It belongs to linear class n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So even that I can write it as big O omega theta.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So don't mix up with the cases.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: That's already I have told you.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now I have proved this one.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: When you have a function for a function you can use big O also, omega also, theta also.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: All are true.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: All are correct.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Mostly people confuse that this worst case should be big O, this is upper bound, maximum upper bound.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Lower bound so omega.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: No nothing like that.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: You can use any notation.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now next example is binary search tree.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Here I have a binary search tree.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I guess, I hope that you already know binary search tree.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: The purpose of binary search tree is useful for searching.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: The elements are organized such that for every node all the elements smaller are on the left hand side.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: All the greater elements on the right hand side.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for searching if you are searching for smaller element we go on left side or greater element we go on right side.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Suppose I am searching for 15.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Let me show you the working.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If I am searching for 15 I will start from 20.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Is it 15?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: No.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 15 is smaller than this one so go to left hand side.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Is it 15?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: No.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 15 is greater than this one so go on right hand side.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes, 15 is found.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So what is the time taken for searching?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Total how many comparisons I have done?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Only 3 comparisons I have done.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the time taken is 3.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So actually that is equal to the height of a tree.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Height of a tree.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So what is the height?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: We usually call it as log n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Right.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Log n is the height.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So around 7 elements I have.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Means 8 elements.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So log 8 is 3.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So 3 comparisons are required.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the height of a tree is log n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the time taken is log n for 15.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now let us understand what is best case and what is the best case time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Worst case and worst case time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Best case is if I am searching for the element which is present in the root.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Best case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Searching root element.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In short I am writing.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Means I am searching for the key element which is present in the root.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So how much time it will take for searching for that particular element?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Just constant time.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If I am searching for 20 just check it in the root.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes the element is found.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the best case time is.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Best case time is.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Bn is 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Bn is 1.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then what is worst case?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Worst case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Worst case is searching for the element which is present in the leaf.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: That is worst case.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So what is worst case time?

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Log n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Log n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the worst case is log n.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Worst case is log n.

chunks.text: Right.

chunks.text: Now.

chunks.title: Best Worst and Average Case Analysis - Abdul Bari
